mapper.select: SELECT VIEW_ID FROM r_user_tpo_view_t WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND GROUP_ID = #{groupId} LIMIT 1

SELECT VIEW_ID AS viewId, USER_ID AS userId, GROUP_ID AS groupId, ZOOM AS zoom, CENTER_X AS centerX, CENTER_Y AS centerY, BACK_ICON_DATA AS backIconData FROM r_user_tpo_view_t WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND GROUP_ID = #{groupId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO r_user_tpo_view_t (USER_ID, GROUP_ID, ZOOM, CENTER_X, CENTER_Y) VALUES (#{userId}, #{groupId}, #{req.zoom}, #{req.centerX}, #{req.centerY})
mapper.select: SELECT n.NODE_KEY AS id, LOWER(n.NODE_TYPE) AS nodeType, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'GROUP' THEN n.GROUP_ID ELSE NULL END AS groupId, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN n.DEVICE_ID ELSE NULL END AS deviceId, CASE WHEN n.ICON_DATA IS NOT NULL THEN n.ICON_DATA WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN m.ICON_DATA ELSE g.ICON_DATA END AS iconData, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN COALESCE(d.DEVICE_NAME, d.DEVICE_SYSTEM_NAME, n.NODE_KEY) WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'GROUP' THEN COALESCE(g.GROUP_NAME, n.NODE_KEY) ELSE n.NODE_KEY END AS name, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN COALESCE(m.MODEL_NAME, 'Unknown') WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'GROUP' THEN 'group' ELSE 'unknown' END AS type, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN d.DEVICE_IP ELSE '' END AS ip, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'GROUP' THEN g.ADDRESS WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN gd.ADDRESS ELSE '' END AS location, CASE WHEN UPPER(n.NODE_TYPE) = 'DEVICE' THEN d.DEVICE_DESC ELSE '' END AS note, n.X AS x, n.Y AS y, COALESCE(n.FX, n.X) AS fx, COALESCE(n.FY, n.Y) AS fy FROM r_user_tpo_node_t n LEFT JOIN r_device_t d ON n.DEVICE_ID = d.DEVICE_ID LEFT JOIN r_group_t g ON n.GROUP_ID = g.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN r_group_t gd ON d.GROUP_ID = gd.GROUP_ID LEFT JOIN r_model_t m ON d.MODEL_ID = m.MODEL_ID WHERE n.VIEW_ID = #{viewId} ORDER BY n.NODE_KEY
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO r_user_tpo_node_t (VIEW_ID, NODE_KEY, NODE_TYPE, DEVICE_ID, GROUP_ID, X, Y, FX, FY, ICON_DATA) VALUES
(#{viewId}, #{n.id}, #{n.nodeType}, #{n.deviceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{n.groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{n.x}, #{n.y}, #{n.fx}, #{n.fy}, #{n.iconData,jdbcType=CLOB})
mapper.select: SELECT l.SRC_NODE_KEY AS source, l.DST_NODE_KEY AS target, l.SRC_IF_KEY AS srcIfIndex, l.DST_IF_KEY AS dstIfIndex, l.SRC_TYPE AS srcType, l.DST_TYPE AS dstType, sp.IF_NAME AS srcIfName, dp.IF_NAME AS dstIfName, l.STATUS AS status FROM r_user_tpo_link_t l LEFT JOIN r_port_t sp ON l.SRC_NODE_KEY = sp.DEVICE_ID AND l.SRC_IF_KEY = sp.IF_INDEX LEFT JOIN r_port_t dp ON l.DST_NODE_KEY = dp.DEVICE_ID AND l.DST_IF_KEY = dp.IF_INDEX WHERE l.VIEW_ID = #{viewId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO r_user_tpo_link_t (VIEW_ID, SRC_NODE_KEY, SRC_IF_KEY, SRC_TYPE, DST_NODE_KEY, DST_IF_KEY, DST_TYPE, STATUS) VALUES
(#{viewId}, #{l.source}, #{l.srcIfIndex}, #{l.srcType}, #{l.target}, #{l.dstIfIndex}, #{l.dstType}, #{l.status})
